name: Pumpkin Doughnuts
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat eggs and sugar until light and fluffy.
2. Add oil, pumpkin, and buttermilk to the egg mixture.
3. Mix dry ingredients together (flour, salt, baking powder, baking soda, nutmeg, cinnamon, and ginger) and add to the egg mixture.
4. Chill the dough for 1 hour.
5. Turn out the chilled dough on a floured surface and roll it to a thickness of 1/2 inch.
6. Cut the rolled dough into doughnut shapes using a doughnut cutter.
7. Deep fry the doughnuts at 375 degrees Fahrenheit until they are brown on one side.
8. Flip the doughnuts over and fry until brown on the other side.
9. Drain the fried doughnuts well on paper towels.
10. Roll the cooled doughnuts in sugar to coat.
